response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with ~15 years of polyglot engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows). However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI Strategy, which requires recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud-scale design fluency, and engineering leadership at a strategic level. The resume shows senior IC contributions but no evidence of principal/director-level scope, no advanced AI degree or research, no recognized AI products, and limited demonstrated cloud architecture leadership. Recent AI work is brief and tooling-adjacent rather than strategic.
strengths: Broad ~15-year polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at high scale
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source founder, public talks and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated Principal/Director-level scope, strategic advisory work, or org-wide technical leadership
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused; no recognized AI products, platforms, or research credentials
Limited evidence of deep cloud architecture expertise (some AWS CDK, Kubernetes) at the scale this role implies

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and products
Strong polyglot engineering breadth and craftsmanship
